# Pact's End

## Card Text

- Cost: 0
- Type/Rarity: Attack / Rare
- Base: Can only be played if you have 3 or more cards in your Exhaust Pile. Deal 17 damage to ALL enemies.

---
<!-- META-AGENT NOTES — do not edit above this line -->
## Strategy Notes

- Strong 0-cost AoE payoff once the exhaust pile has 3+ cards; prioritize controlled exhaust such as True Grit, Burning Pact, Second Wind, and status/curse exhaust support.
- Weak before the exhaust condition is met; do not count it as opening damage in the first shuffle unless the deck reliably exhausts cards early.
- Bad Neow rare pick for a plain starter deck: without existing exhaust, it is conditionally dead during the first fights.
